description: Lowest-common-denominator strategy: generates wrappers using only API surface common to FluentAssertions v5, v6, and v8.
notes: This strategy produces wrappers that compile against any FA version from v5 through v8. It excludes members introduced in v6+ (AllSatisfy, ThrowExactly, NotBeNullOrWhiteSpace, BeCloseTo, BooleanAssertions.NotBe) and v8+ (Satisfy, AssertionChain). Use this when your codebase must support multiple FA versions simultaneously.
